page_metadata.biotools__summary: Part of the crambled-seg pipeline. It allows to interactively explore the cellularity, depth of coverage and clonality of tumour samples that have gone for whole-genome sequencing. In particular, it allows the user to assess the competing solutions for such data that can arise from using different packages.

It allows to interactively explore the cellularity, depth of coverage and clonality of tumour samples that have gone for whole-genome sequencing.
